signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 | NO** | **MED** confidence

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February, but below market forecasts of 2.4%[2].
